title: Claude Sonnet 5 Launched: Anthropic's Most Agentic AI Model Yet — 1M Context, Aggressive Pricing
content:
Breaking — June 30, 2026. Anthropic has officially unveiled Claude Sonnet 5, the latest evolution of its Sonnet-class model family, positioned as the most agentic AI model the company has ever released. This launch marks a pivotal moment in the generative AI race.

🧠 Key Capabilities
Sonnet 5 excels in complex agentic workflows: sophisticated code generation, multi-file debugging, browser and terminal tool use, and autonomous task planning. Anthropic claims it delivers near-Opus-level intelligence while maintaining the speed and cost profile that defines the Sonnet family.

📊 Technical Specifications
• Context Window: 1 million tokens — 8× larger than GPT-4o's 128K tokens
• Introductory Pricing: $2 per million input tokens, $10 per million output tokens (valid through August 31, 2026)
• Standard Pricing: $3 / $15 per million tokens after the introductory period
• Availability: Anthropic API, Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud, Microsoft Foundry, and claude.ai (web, iOS, Android)

⚔️ Head-to-Head: Claude Sonnet 5 vs GPT-4o
Against OpenAI's GPT-4o, Sonnet 5 stands out with its massive context window (1M vs 128K tokens) and lower input pricing ($2 vs $2.50 per million). Output costs are identical at $10 per million tokens. The contextual advantage is decisive for processing large codebases, lengthy technical documentation, and extended agentic workflows.

🔄 The 2026 Claude Landscape
This release fits into an accelerated cadence at Anthropic: Claude Opus 4.8 (May 28, 2026) remains the general-purpose flagship, while Claude Fable 5 (June 9, 2026) represents the cutting-edge Mythos-class frontier model. Claude Sonnet 4 was retired on June 15, 2026, now replaced by this next generation.

🚀 Developer Impact
The ecosystem is shifting toward agentic coding, where tools like Claude Code and Cowork orchestrate long-running tasks via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Developers can now focus on architecture and strategy while AI handles detailed implementation — from debugging entire repositories to autonomously managing multi-step software development lifecycles.

PrestaShop Remark: Integrate Claude Sonnet 5 via the Anthropic API to automate product description generation, SEO optimization of product pages, and PrestaShop code maintenance — the 1M token context window allows analyzing an entire module or theme in a single request.
